page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c7a.4xlarge is a compute-optimized virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 16 dedicated physical cores on an x86_64 AMD EPYC 7T83 processor running at 2.55 GHz, with one thread per core. The instance is equipped with 32.0 GB of system memory, providing a resource density of 2.0 GB per core. It does not include local storage or GPU hardware accelerators, relying entirely on network-attached storage and featuring a baseline network bandwidth of 5 Gbps.

Performance benchmarks indicate strong single-core CPU capabilities, placing in the top 25% in stress-ng single-core tests. Multi-core performance, PassMark CPU scores, and database operations align with the middle 50% average. Memory bandwidth benchmarks reveal a significant performance tradeoff; while cached small-block reads perform at an average level, uncached large-block reads and writes fall into the weak and poor categories, respectively. Text generation for small language models performs strongly, while larger model inference and general decompression tasks maintain average throughput.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the dedicated AMD EPYC hardware profile offers a balanced compute-to-memory ratio of 1:2, making it a viable option for compute-bound workloads that do not require massive memory footprints or local storage. The instance is suited for workloads such as static web serving, redis-based caching, single-threaded compression tasks, and moderate-scale CPU-based machine learning inference.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c7a.4xlarge is a compute-optimized instance featuring 16 dedicated physical cores powered by an AMD EPYC 7T83 processor running at 2.55 GHz. Built on the x86_64 architecture and the KVM hypervisor, it delivers 32.0 GB of system memory, translating to 2.0 GB per core, with no local storage or GPU accelerators. Benchmark results show strong single-core CPU performance and efficient small-model text generation, though uncached memory write bandwidth is a notable bottleneck. With a baseline network bandwidth of 5 Gbps, this instance is designed for compute-heavy workloads such as static web serving, redis operations, and moderate CPU-based inference tasks where dedicated CPU allocation is required without the need for high memory density.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c7a.4xlarge is a compute-optimized instance with 16 dedicated AMD EPYC cores, 32 GB RAM, and 5 Gbps network bandwidth, delivering strong single-core performance for compute-bound workloads.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c7a.4xlarge features 16 dedicated AMD EPYC cores and 32 GB RAM, optimized for compute-heavy workloads and static web serving.
tagline: A dedicated AMD EPYC compute-optimized instance delivering strong single-core performance for processing-heavy workloads without local storage requirements.

32.0 GB of system memory providing 2.0 GB per core
Strong single-core CPU and small-model text generation performance
Baseline network bandwidth of 5 Gbps with no local storage
Suited for static web serving, redis caching, and CPU-based inference
